author: lOrm
content: Duplicate of #388 (closed 2026-05-20) + #642 (closed 2026-05-20). Table-driven pricing + fast-mode tier are landed: src/session/pricing.rs:247 defines static PRICING_TABLE: &[(&str, ModelPricing)] walked top-to-bottom (ordering enforced by tests::ordering_no_entry_is_prefix_of_earlier); ModelPricing has fast_mode_input_per_million / fast_mode_output_per_million; calculate_cost_fast_mode swaps in COST_TIER_30_150 for Opus 4.6+; calculate_cost returns PricingError::UnknownModel; cache-write multipliers split into cache_write_5m_multiplier / cache_write_1hr_multiplier selected by CacheWriteTtl. Verified at HEAD f0c5612b.
